name: expert-advisor-builder
description: Build personal RAG advisor bots from any expert's content. Sweeps an expert's high-signal channels (YouTube, X/Twitter, podcasts, blogs, Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn) via Apify, ingests newsletters and books, assembles a clean source-tagged corpus, and generates a ready-to-paste Claude Project setup. Includes build-advisor (single mentor) and build-panel (multi-expert subject board).
